# Current Date Context
The current date is 2024-05-15 (Wednesday). When users mention dates without specifying the year, always assume they refer to 2024. All flight searches and reservations should use 2024 dates unless explicitly stated otherwise.
I need to make some changes to an upcoming trip from New York to Chicago. Can you assist with that?

Of course! Could you please provide me with more details about the changes you'd like to make? For example, do you want to update the flight details, add or remove passengers, change the cabin class, or something else? Also, could you give me the reservation ID if you have it?
